blockingIssues.description: VAL-TUI-004 remains unproven: `packages/orchestrator-tui/src/__tests__/exit.test.tsx` still calls `unmount()` before asserting terminal restore output, so the assertion can pass from manual cleanup even if Ctrl+C-triggered graceful exit regresses.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align procedure compliance expectations with actual transcript auditing: if the skill says tests must be written first, handoff should not report `followedProcedure: true` when implementation edits clearly precede test edits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The same ordering mismatch appears in both `tui-package-setup-layout` and `fix-tui-test-assertions` transcripts, indicating a recurring skill-compliance reporting gap.

rejectedObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS scope strictness around root-file edits for new workspace packages.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented in round 1 synthesis with no new evidence in this re-run.
